strategies.name: INELASTIC
strategies.mandate: Equity-like compounding with a structurally bounded downside. No leverage, ever.
strategies.holds: A diversified core of equity, government-bond, gold and trend-following exposure; a protective hedge that activates only in downtrends; and a small defined-risk index-option overlay that is active only in qualifying volatility regimes.

strategies.name: GATED PREMIUM
strategies.mandate: Harvest index volatility premium only when the regime pays for it; hard loss control.
strategies.holds: Short-dated index option premium, entered under a volatility-regime gate, with an automatic loss-control rule on every position. Flat when the regime does not qualify.

logs_past.text: Index option position cash-settled at expiry
Profit target reached — option spread bought back
Premium position closed by loss-control rule
Defined-risk index option structure opened (regime qualified)

logs_upcoming.text: New defined-risk position — only if the volatility regime qualifies and capacity is available
Profit-target buyback resting on each open spread (fills automatically)
August expiry — any remaining position cash-settles
Monthly premium cycle — enters only in a qualifying regime; loss-control stop armed on entry
Protective hedge arms automatically if the index breaks its long-term trend
